name: se-interaction-contract-regression-tests
title: Pin SE interaction contracts
description: Add focused regression tests for the verified interaction contracts in se-meeting-prep, se-profile, se-knowledge-capture, se-research, se-help, and se-feedback. Preserve existing skill behavior and distinguish required blocking questions from useful non-blocking clarification.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Test-only hardening. Focused test_skills suite and make check pass; no canonical skill, generated surface, manifest, or release payload changed.
